title: Unwavering Optimisations
description: An effective optimisation pack originally made for myself after encountering inconsistent framerates using SO.
body:
An entirely vanilla-based optimisations modpack which I originally made and used for myself due to seeing overall better and more consistent framerates than Simply Optimised.

This hasn't been thoroughly tested, but I saw a 50% or more increase over SO while using this modpack. It may show different results for other people, but it should be better overall with the caveat of having more mods.
